name: Indonesian Barbecued Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
Prepare dipping sauce by mixing all ingredients until smooth. Cover until serving time.
Make a shallow cut lengthwise down the back of each shrimp; wash out vein.
Mix remaining ingredients in a medium glass bowl. Add shrimp; stir to coat with marinade.
Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Remove shrimp from marinade; reserve marinade.
Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving space between each.
Cover and grill shrimp about 4 inches from medium coals, turning occasionally and brushing with marinade 2-3 times until shrimp are pink.
Serve with sauce, and if desired, lime wedges.
